site.title: Joshua de Ruiter - Jr Developer
site.description: I'm a developer based in Canada, passionate about user experience and specializing in engaging animations and micro-interactions. My primary programs of choice include: JavaScript, HTML/CSS, C#, Flutter, React, and Node.js.

about.title: About me
about.intro: Hi, I'm Joshua, a software developer from Canada.
about.toolsIntro: My primary programs of choice include:
about.passion: I love exploring new things and doing things I'm passionate about. I have an eye for detail and often find things that don't quite fit or are unoptimal/broken and then fix them.
about.approach: I always look to understand all the details of something first, being confident in the tools required is integral. I then let myself get emmersed in the creation of it often working for bundles of time on that thing until it's perfected.
